creator: freebsd@chthonic.com
text:
On Fri, Dec 05, 2008 at 01:19:42PM -0500, freebsd@chthonic.com wrote:
> On Thu, Dec 04, 2008 at 05:30:15PM +0100, Oliver Lehmann wrote:
> > Hi,
> > 
> > have you tried recompiling openal?
> 
> Yes, at least once.
> 
> > There is no error in freealut itself because the mentioned functions
> > are not used, but I guess something during the openal librar<
> > linking gets wrong - maybe some MMX support detection?
> 
> I will rebuild world through the relevant ports over the weekend, and
> update the ticket on Sunday or Monday.
> 
> I should note that I thought it might be something easily fixed, so I
> reported it. If it turns out to be not easy, I have no reason to leave
> the ticket open.
> 
> Thanks for your time, and best regards,

I've had no success (re)building the ports.

Thanks for your time.
